title: Support SystemVerilog style partial ANSI port declarations

features.name: ansi_port_list_shared_direction_and_type
features.description: Code should include an ANSI port list where multiple ports share the same direction, signal kind, and data type declaration

features.name: ansi_port_list_per_port_type_override
features.description: Code should include an ANSI port list with per-port type/data type overrides, where subsequent ports omit direction but specify different data types
features.snippet: module test (input [3:0] a, [1:0] b, int c);

features.name: ansi_port_list_per_port_kind_override
features.description: Code should include an ANSI port list with per-port kind (var/wire) overrides on ports that share a common direction
features.snippet: module test(input [3:0] a, var b, wire c);

features.name: ansi_port_implicit_inout_direction
features.description: Code should include an ANSI port list where the first port omits direction but specifies a data type, defaulting to inout direction

features.name: ansi_port_per_port_unpacked_dimensions
features.description: Code should include an ANSI port list with per-port unpacked dimensions following a base type declaration
features.snippet: module test(input integer a, b[1:0], c[3:0][1:0]);
